name: repo-finder
description: One-command repo resolution for agents: resolve a repo name to every local copy with orientation facts (path, origin, default branch, checkout-vs-worktree kind, branch, dirty state, build tooling) via a config-bounded multi-root scan — falling back to the user's configured GitHub orgs over gh REST-first (GraphQL only as configured fallback) for exact clone names. Deterministic ranking (checkouts, then worktrees labeled with their main repo, then nested copies); recency displayed, not ranked, so the consuming LLM decides. Single-file zero-dependency uv Python script inside the skill; conforms to the CLI Design Standard (small-CLI profile, minimal tier). Replaces token-expensive ls/find cascades and repeated gh repo view identity checks.
